security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://*.feishu.cn https://*.feishucn.com https://*.oceanengine.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*; font-src 'self' data: https://*; connect-src 'self' https://* wss://*;
